goal: Add a side-effect-free patch preflight for the BPK-055 cockpit mount implementation plan, validating planned files, route, env gate, reviewer, and default-off status without changing server, route, renderer, runtime, package, workflow, or deployment files.
scope_out: Do not implement the patch, mutate server files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call AICOS, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, or deployment files.
claims: Cockpit mount patch can be preflighted without changing files.
Ready BPK-055 plan, planned files, route, env gate, and reviewer ref are required.
assumptions: A later implementation task would need a new lock.
dod: Ready, unplanned file, and blocked plan cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Server mutation, route mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, or deployment changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-055 planned cockpit mount implementation without changing files.
